	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (NaroInu.sol#619)

[NaroInu.sendETHToFee(uint256)](NaroInu.sol#L615-L621) sends eth to arbitrary user

	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](NaroInu.sol#L619)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in NaroInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (NaroInu.sol#467-595):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (NaroInu.sol#563)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (NaroInu.sol#609)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (NaroInu.sol#569)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (NaroInu.sol#617)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (NaroInu.sol#619)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (NaroInu.sol#591)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (NaroInu.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (NaroInu.sol#701)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (NaroInu.sol#703)
	NaroInu._rOwned (NaroInu.sol#231) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- NaroInu._takeTeam(uint256) (NaroInu.sol#715-723)
	- NaroInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (NaroInu.sol#697-711)
	- NaroInu.balanceOf(address) (NaroInu.sol#347-351)
	- NaroInu.constructor(address,address) (NaroInu.sol#293-311)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (NaroInu.sol#591)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (NaroInu.sol#729)
	NaroInu._rTotal (NaroInu.sol#243) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- NaroInu._getCurrentSupply() (NaroInu.sol#795-805)
	- NaroInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (NaroInu.sol#727-733)
	- NaroInu.constructor(address,address) (NaroInu.sol#293-311)
	- NaroInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (NaroInu.sol#403-411)

detectors.description:
NaroInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (NaroInu.sol#467-595) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp) (NaroInu.sol#497)
	- require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp) (NaroInu.sol#513)
	- firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp (NaroInu.sol#515)

detectors.description: NaroInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (NaroInu.sol#467-595) has a high cyclomatic complexity (14).

Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (NaroInu.sol#9)
